MeasurementToolMetadata.Description: Clinical consensus diagnoses (DSM-IV Axis I / Axis II) and diagnostic flags
MeasurementToolMetadata.LongName: Subset of the consensus diagnostic record (derived from the GOASSESS interview and clinical consensus) selected for release. AXIS*_DESC fields are free-text diagnosis descriptions; dx_* are binary diagnostic-category flags. No formal data dictionary was available for these fields, so descriptions below are inferred from the column names and data; treat dx_pscat and dxsum as provisional.

AXIS1_DESC1.Description: DSM-IV Axis I clinical diagnosis #1 (free text). 'No Diagnosis or Condition on Axis I' = none; n/a = no further diagnosis recorded.

AXIS1_DESC2.Description: DSM-IV Axis I clinical diagnosis #2 (free text). 'No Diagnosis or Condition on Axis I' = none; n/a = no further diagnosis recorded.

AXIS1_DESC3.Description: DSM-IV Axis I clinical diagnosis #3 (free text). 'No Diagnosis or Condition on Axis I' = none; n/a = no further diagnosis recorded.

AXIS1_DESC4.Description: DSM-IV Axis I clinical diagnosis #4 (free text). 'No Diagnosis or Condition on Axis I' = none; n/a = no further diagnosis recorded.

AXIS1_DESC5.Description: DSM-IV Axis I clinical diagnosis #5 (free text). 'No Diagnosis or Condition on Axis I' = none; n/a = no further diagnosis recorded.

AXIS1_DESC6.Description: DSM-IV Axis I clinical diagnosis #6 (free text). 'No Diagnosis or Condition on Axis I' = none; n/a = no further diagnosis recorded.

AXIS1_DESC7.Description: DSM-IV Axis I clinical diagnosis #7 (free text). 'No Diagnosis or Condition on Axis I' = none; n/a = no further diagnosis recorded.

AXIS1_DESC8.Description: DSM-IV Axis I clinical diagnosis #8 (free text). 'No Diagnosis or Condition on Axis I' = none; n/a = no further diagnosis recorded.

AXIS1_DESC9.Description: DSM-IV Axis I clinical diagnosis #9 (free text). 'No Diagnosis or Condition on Axis I' = none; n/a = no further diagnosis recorded.

AXIS1_DESC10.Description: DSM-IV Axis I clinical diagnosis #10 (free text). 'No Diagnosis or Condition on Axis I' = none; n/a = no further diagnosis recorded.

AXIS2_DESC1.Description: DSM-IV Axis II diagnosis (personality disorders / intellectual disability), free text. 'Deferred Diagnosis' / 'No Diagnosis on Axis II' as recorded; n/a = not available.

dx_moodnos.Description: Mood disorder not otherwise specified - diagnostic flag.

dx_prodromal.Description: Prodromal / clinical high-risk for psychosis - diagnostic flag.

dx_pscat.Description: Psychosis-spectrum category (meaning not documented; verify) - diagnostic flag.

dxsum.Description: Number of diagnoses recorded for the participant (integer count; observed range 0-7 in these data). 0 = no diagnosis. Exact derivation is not formally documented - provisional.
